rag_rules: AGREE diagnostics pointing to implementation-level references in type annexes should be resolved by moving valid bindings to implementation scope or removing invalid guarantees
Property associations that do not point to valid targets should be removed or corrected to reference valid AADL features
generic_rules: Only use visible identifiers and features from the current AADL scope in AGREE contracts
Ensure AGREE assumptions and guarantees are placed in the correct component scope (type vs. implementation)
Avoid generating property references or data types not present in the analyzed model
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Implementation-level bindings should be placed in component implementation annexes
anti_patterns: Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers or property references not present in the model
Do not place implementation-level references in component type annexes
